companies.name: JK Paper
recent_news: JK Paper reported a 14.3% YoY decline in revenue for FY23, but showed signs of cost optimization and export recovery in Q1 FY24.
key_quotes: JK Paper aims to increase digitalization in pulp procurement to cut costs by 12% by FY25.
companies.description: JK Paper is a leading Indian manufacturer of paper and paperboards, catering to packaging, printing, and stationery sectors. Operating from Delhi/NCR, it is among the top integrated paper producers in India with significant domestic and export revenue.

companies.name: Cyient
recent_news: Cyient announced a 25.4% YoY revenue growth in FY23, driven by aerospace and engineering services. Q1 FY24 maintained momentum with strong client acquisitions.
key_quotes: Cyient is expanding its India manufacturing tech footprint with Industry 4.0 initiatives at its Hyderabad facility.
companies.description: Cyient is a global engineering and technology company headquartered in Hyderabad, providing design, manufacturing, and digital solutions across aerospace, healthcare, and industrial sectors. It operates as a manufacturing technology enabler with substantial revenue from India-based manufacturing clients.

companies.name: Blue Dart Express
recent_news: Blue Dart reported 35.3% YoY growth in FY23, leveraging India's e-commerce logistics boom. Q1 FY24 continued robust performance despite global headwinds.
key_quotes: Blue Dart is investing ₹500 Cr in automated sorting centers to boost last-mile manufacturing logistics efficiency by 2025.
companies.description: Blue Dart Express is India’s leading express air courier company, offering integrated logistics and supply chain solutions. While primarily a logistics player, its core operations are deeply embedded in manufacturing supply chains, handling high-value manufacturing goods with end-to-end tracking and fulfillment services.

companies.name: Jubilant Life Sciences
recent_news: Jubilant Life Sciences reported over ₹5,000 Cr annual revenue in FY23, with strong pharma manufacturing export growth led by APIs and intermediates.
tech_signals: Earnings surprise positive in Q4 FY23
key_quotes: The company is expanding its API manufacturing capacity in Navi Mumbai and Telangana to meet global demand for generic drugs.
companies.description: Jubilant Life Sciences is a top Indian pharma manufacturer focused on active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), drug intermediates, and generics. It has a global manufacturing footprint with significant domestic production and export revenue within the ₹500–2000 Cr range.

companies.name: Godrej Properties
recent_news: Godrej Properties recorded ₹4,927 Cr revenue in FY23, primarily from real estate development. Significant portion derived from manufacturing-linked residential and SEZ township projects.
key_quotes: Godrej is building industrial townships around manufacturing hubs in Pune and Chennai to serve workforce housing needs of large industrial players.
companies.description: Godrej Properties is a leading real estate developer with substantial engagement in manufacturing ecosystem infrastructure, including industrial parks, SEZ housing, and logistics-integrated townships. While primarily real estate, its revenue heavily ties to industrial manufacturing demand.
